scans.name: running_processes
scans.sql: SELECT pid, name, path, cmdline, uid, start_time FROM processes LIMIT 10;

scans.name: open_network_connections
scans.sql: SELECT pid, local_address, local_port, remote_address, remote_port, state, protocol FROM process_open_sockets WHERE remote_address != '' LIMIT 10;
scans.description: Show active network connections with remote endpoints.

scans.name: logged_in_users
scans.sql: SELECT type, user, time, pid, sid FROM logged_in_users LIMIT 10;

scans.name: file_integrity_events
scans.description: Monitor up to 10 file changes on watched paths (requires file_paths config; table constraints may apply).

scans.name: installed_apps
scans.description: List up to 10 installed macOS application names (from the apps table; version/install_location omitted for brevity).

scans.name: kernel_modules
scans.sql: SELECT name, size, used_by, status, address FROM kernel_modules LIMIT 10;

scans.name: usb_history
scans.sql: SELECT usb_address, usb_port, vendor, vendor_id, version, model, model_id, serial, class, subclass, protocol, removable FROM usb_devices LIMIT 10;
